description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, thatched roof with a natural, textured appearance, giving it a rustic and traditional look. The exterior walls are constructed from light-colored stone, adding to the cottage-like charm. Small, arched windows are set into the roof and walls, providing a cozy and inviting feel. The front facade includes a prominent arched entryway with a wooden door, sheltered by an overhanging section of the roof. A wooden barrel sits near the entrance, enhancing the rural aesthetic. The overall structure is compact, with a single main story and attic-like upper spaces visible through the roof windows.
description: A rustic stone house with a steep thatched roof, arched windows, and a sheltered wooden entryway. The design evokes a traditional countryside cottage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched entryway, wooden door, three roof windows, and a barrel near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick thatched roof, stone wall, and partial visibility of the front entry and barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted thatched roof and plain stone wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end, stone wall, and the full height of the thatched roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched wooden door under a thatched overhang, with a small barrel and no porch or steps.
